tweets.text:
What happens when AI Voice Agents get a face?

We're excited to partner with @ElevenLabs for the final #ElevenHacks challenge.

Build an AI agent where the visual experience isn't just a feature – it's essential.

🏆 Nearly $12K in credits up for winning
🚀 Ready to build?

profile_bio.description: D-ID's AI platforms enable dynamic videos and interactive experiences featuring digital people.

quoted_tweet.text:
The final ElevenHacks of this season is live - Hackathon #11.

The challenge: Use @ElevenLabs and @D_ID_ to build an agent where the visual experience is essential, not optional.

Prize pool: nearly $12k in credits. https://t.co/OJ0UDIQE5w

profile_bio.description: Deploy natural, human-sounding agents with the @ElevenLabs AI audio platform. For status updates, see https://t.co/rFTNGwiTnv.
